conditionDescriptions: severe chronic kidney disease with eGFR <15 ml/min per 1.73 m²
contraindications.clinicalRationale: Limited data available for severe CKD with eGFR <15 ml/min per 1.73 m². While no dosage adjustment is required, use is restricted due to insufficient safety and efficacy data in this population.
contraindications.riskDescription: Unknown safety profile in severe chronic kidney disease
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Consider other GLP-1 RA agents with more robust data in severe CKD
contraindications.sourceSnippet: Liraglutide: 1.2 mg or 1.8 mg once daily; CKD adjustment: No dosage adjustment, use with eGFR >15 ml/min per 1.73 m²

warnings.warningText: Limited data for severe CKD with eGFR <15 ml/min per 1.73 m²
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with severe chronic kidney disease (eGFR <15 ml/min per 1.73 m²)
warnings.actionRequired: Use with caution and monitor closely in patients with eGFR <15 ml/min per 1.73 m². Consider alternative GLP-1 RA agents with more robust data in severe CKD.
